formatted_display: English: Saturday, 27 June 2026 | Nepali: Saturday, 13 Asar 2083
quote: A man is not called wise because he talks and talks again; but if he is peaceful, loving and fearless then he is in truth called wise.
formatted_quote: "A man is not called wise because he talks and talks again; but if he is peaceful, loving and fearless then he is in truth called wise." - Buddha
